Definition: specimen series code number (Düsseldorf collection) as printed in Table I col 1
Note: used for the printed row order; taxonomy applied later via ../_keys/Stephan/

Definition: species name as printed in Matano et al. 1985 Part II (Cerebellar nuclei)
Note: journal names kept (e.g. Lemur fulvus; Cebuella pygmaea); taxonomy applied later
Table I col 3 (Specimens); blank in print means 1
Table I col 4; re-used body weights (largely Stephan et al. 1981)

Definition: volume of the total cerebellar nuclei in mm3 (= MCN + ICN + LCN)
volume of the medial cerebellar nucleus in mm3
volume of the interpositus (interposed) cerebellar nucleus in mm3
Note: Table I col 7 (ICN); pars intermedius zone

Definition: volume of the lateral (dentate) cerebellar nucleus in mm3

Table I also prints size indices and ratios/percentages of the three nuclei (MCN, ICN, LCN). These are derived (allometric/relative) and are NOT transcribed here; recompute downstream with body weights from Stephan et al. 1981.
Note: Per-nucleus regressions in the paper (e.g. log MCN = -0.928 + 0.67 log BoW). Rattus & Spalax carry only a TCN value with no paper species name -> expected csv-only additions (not Matano data).
